label: Hail share of total gross NatCat/extreme-weather solar PV claim amount in U.S./Canada
source_denominator_or_scope: AXIS U.S./Canada solar PV NatCat/extreme-weather claims, five-year review
caveats: Not normalized to exposure; claim universe and policy terms not fully public.

label: Successful stow average hail claim severity
source_denominator_or_scope: reported MW; successful stow deployments
useful_for: event severity / cap check / stow conditioner
caveats: Gross claim basis; project TIV and deductible terms not public.

label: Fixed-tilt average hail claim severity
source_denominator_or_scope: reported MW; fixed-tilt systems
caveats: Gross claim basis; project TIV and deductible terms not public.

label: Tracker failed-stow average hail claim severity
source_denominator_or_scope: reported MW; tracker systems failed to stow

caveats: Gross claim basis; project TIV and deductible terms not public.

label: Heat-strengthened glass average gross claim amount delta vs fully tempered
reported_unit: gross claim dollars per MW delta
source_denominator_or_scope: reported MW; heat-strengthened vs fully tempered glass
caveats: Delta only, not standalone total claim severity.

label: Average ground-up downtime for NatCat/extreme-weather claims
source_denominator_or_scope: AXIS solar PV claims; NatCat/extreme-weather
caveats: Not hail-only; downtime not directly physical damage dollars.

label: Global closed solar PV hail claims gross amount divided by reported affected capacity
source_denominator_or_scope: closed claims 2019–2025; >1M modules; 2.7GW reported in article context
caveats: Do not treat as per-project loss severity; denominator may be affected/project capacity, not damaged capacity or TIV.

label: Hail share of kWh Analytics loss database financial losses
source_denominator_or_scope: kWh loss database; solar installations; damage amount
caveats: No underlying loss ledger or TIV denominator open.

label: Hail share of kWh Analytics loss incidents
source_denominator_or_scope: kWh loss database; solar installations; incident count

label: SRA 2026 pass/fail threshold for modeled 100-MW SAT configurations
source_denominator_or_scope: 100-MW single-axis tracker; threshold normalized here to project default installed value
caveats: Not an actual loss; it is the threshold used to mark fail.

label: Standard design high-hail-risk 100-MW project net loss AAL
source_denominator_or_scope: 100-MW; 2mm untempered glass; no hail stow; source project cost $100M
caveats: Net loss includes deductible obligations; modeled case, not observed claims ledger.

label: Resilient design high-hail-risk 100-MW project net loss AAL
source_denominator_or_scope: 100-MW; 3.2mm tempered glass; robust 52° hail stow; source project cost $115M
caveats: Net loss includes deductible obligations; modeled case, not observed claims ledger.

label: AAL reduction from resilient design in kWh/POWER case
source_denominator_or_scope: standard vs resilient 100-MW modeled case

label: NatCat insurance rate reduction for owner proving 90% operationalized hail stow
source_denominator_or_scope: case study cited by kWh; operationalized hail stow for 90% of past hail events
caveats: Premium/rate reduction is not expected loss; includes market/underwriting effects.
